name: HabitFlow
description: HabitFlow — Build better habits, one day at a time. A modern and intuitive habit tracker with smart analytics, beautiful visualizations, and powerful streak tracking to help you stay consistent and achieve your goals.

name: JavaScript_Projects
description: A comprehensive collection of 25+ JavaScript projects covering animations, DOM manipulation, games, logic, localization, and UI components. Each project demonstrates practical JavaScript concepts with clean, well-commented code and live demos.

name: My_Website
description: A modern portfolio website built to highlight my work, technical skills, and web development journey.

name: Maher-Elmair
description: Personal GitHub profile showcasing projects, skills, and contributions in web development.

name: GitHub-Manager-Pro
description: GitHub Manager Pro is a powerful web application for managing your GitHub followers and following relationships. It helps you discover users who don't follow you back (Unfollowers) and non-reciprocal relationships, while providing smart tools to manage your following list safely and efficiently.

name: Login-multi-auth
description: 🔐 React Multi-Auth App using Firebase — A modern authentication app built with React and Firebase that supports login via Google, GitHub, Microsoft, Facebook, Twitter, Apple, and Email/Password, with toast notifications and a clean UI.

name: AutoSkip-for-YouTube
description: A smart Chrome Extension to automatically skip YouTube ads, mute them if needed, and blur ads without removing them.

name: Headline-News
description: A modern API-driven news aggregation platform. Features real-time news, AI-powered article extraction, market watch, dark/light theme, and customizable reading experience.

name: Noqta-Marketplace
description: Noqta is a smart multi-vendor e-commerce platform focused on trust, discovery, and empowering small sellers. Built with clarity, scalability, and a deep user experience at its core.

name: Todo-List-App
description: 📋 A simple and elegant Todo List application built with React and Material UI.

name: Snapgram-SocialApp
description: Build a modern social app with a stunning UI with a native mobile feel, a special tech stack, an infinite scroll feature, and amazing performance using React JS, Appwrite, TypeScript, and more.

name: calendar-app
description: 📅 A dynamic React calendar app to add, edit, and delete events with time and description — great for practicing state and date handling.

name: prayers-timings
description: A simple prayer times app built with React and Vite. It shows daily prayer timings based on selected city and country, with a clean and responsive UI.

name: google-auth-app
description: A simple React app that uses Google OAuth to authenticate users and display their profile information with a logout option.

name: Weather-App
description: A Weather App built with React + Vite + Material UI, featuring multilingual support (Arabic & English), localized date and time formatting using Moment.js, and real-time weather data fetched from the OpenWeatherMap API.

name: Refined-Admin-Dashboard
description: 🚀 Personal fork to practice Adrian Hajdin - JS Mastery tutorial: building a modern Admin Dashboard. 💻 CRUD, analytics, Kanban tasks & fully responsive design!

name: ChronoTool
